Prepare trade-off plot

prepare_tradeoff_plot.Rd

Add points and dual CIs to trade-off plot

Usage

prepare_tradeoff_plot(
  myplot,
  data,
  df_br,
  drug_status,
  filter,
  ci,
  chartcolors
)

Arguments

myplot

raw plot

data

(data.frame) input dataset

df_br

(data.frame) processed dataset

drug_status

(character) selected status of drug to display (Approved, Test)

filter

(character) selected filter

ci

(character) selected choice to display confidence intervals or not (Yes, No)

chartcolors

(vector) a vector of colors, the same number of levels as the number of treatments

On this page
